scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -k -n shared,agents,api,web,worker -c cyan,magenta,blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @ados/shared" "npm run dev -w @ados/agents" "npm run dev -w @ados/api" "npm run dev -w @ados/web" "npm run dev -w @ados/temporal-worker"
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build -w @ados/shared && npm run build -w @ados/agents && npm run dev -w @ados/temporal-worker
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ados/shared && npm run build -w @ados/db && npm run build -w @ados/agents && npm run build -w @ados/api && npm run build -w @ados/temporal-worker && npm run build -w @ados/web
